text:
Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh wrote:
>   BTW, there is still a missing "/etc/main.cf" in ${WRKSRC}/postgrey.
>   The modified patch is attached.

Good catch.  I hadn't thought to check for typos.  Yes, please use 
single quotes.  Otherwise, looks good, please commit.

Thanks!
